creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #7)

First of all, thanks for your patience and effort, I'll probably wouldn't be strong enough to do all that stuff myself.

Still struggling with free time, but if v4 doesn't change (by default) lightdm's functionality and doesn't unconditionally require those lots of python modules, testing should be relatively short and easy. So, I'll try to allocate time for that on Friday.
